site.title: Interactive Systems Learning
site.tagline: Hands-on explainers for how real infrastructure works.

modules.title: MIG vs vGPU — Internals
modules.description: How NVIDIA partitions a datacenter GPU. Build MIG slices, vGPUs and MIG-backed vGPUs, run workloads, and watch spatial vs temporal scheduling, fault isolation and time-slicing live. Includes a ~3-minute explainer film.
